# Auto-Generated Lock Screen Voca 📱

> A simple web app designed to help myself (and anyone else) learn English vocabulary effortlessly by turning the smartphone lock screen into a learning space.

## 💡 Main Idea
People check their phones dozens of times a day. What if every time you look at your lock screen, you learn a new word? This app lets you manage a list of English words you want to learn, automatically generates natural example sentences using AI, and turns them into beautiful wallpapers perfectly sized for your smartphone's lock screen.

## ✨ What It Can Do
- **Word Management**: Add, organize, and archive words you want to memorize.
- **AI Sentence Generation**: Automatically generates contextual example sentences using Google Gemini AI (you can even customize the prompt!).
- **Wallpaper Generation**: Creates clean, aesthetic wallpapers containing your words and sentences, ready to be set as your lock screen.
- **Fast & Local**: Generates images quickly on your device and supports easy sharing/downloading via the Web Share API.
- **PWA Support**: Install it on your phone like a native app for quick access.

## 🚀 Why It's Unique (The Edge)
Unlike traditional flashcard apps that require you to actively open the app to study, this app integrates learning into your existing daily habits. By putting the words directly on your lock screen, it guarantees repeated exposure throughout the day with zero extra effort. Plus, the AI integration ensures you're learning words in natural, practical contexts rather than just isolated definitions.

## 🛠️ Tech Stack
[![Tech Stack](https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=ts,react,nextjs,tailwind,supabase,jest)](https://skillicons.dev)
- **Frontend**: Next.js (App Router), React, Tailwind CSS v4
- **Backend/Database**: Supabase
- **AI**: Google Gemini AI API
- **Testing**: Jest
